name: @mem-weave/opencode-plugin
description: MemWeave OpenCode plugin: ships a .mcp.json so oh-my-openagent auto-registers the MemWeave remote MCP, and auto-injects summary-only memory XML into the agent's system prompt at session_start, prompt_delta, and file_pack phases. Also writes every chat message back to the server for write-side closure (consolidation).
